description_long: This is a modern military jet aircraft with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features twin vertical stabilizers at the tail, each with a yellow tip and a dark insignia, and a pair of large jet engine exhausts at the rear. The wings are mid-mounted and swept, with visible hardpoints carrying ordnance beneath them. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a dark, streamlined canopy. The landing gear is deployed, with a single nose wheel and two main gear units visible. The overall color scheme is a light gray with some darker accents and markings.
description: A modern gray military jet with swept mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward enclosed cockpit. It features visible landing gear and underwing ordnance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, wing sweep, and the symmetry of the twin tail fins.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the fuselage, wings, and tail.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, vertical stabilizers, and the full span of the swept wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with moderate anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer (H-tail configuration).
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-piece canopy, likely multi-seat.
